overview.title: System Overview
overview.description: The Auto Ads Management System is a comprehensive platform that helps you manage Facebook advertising campaigns, automate processes, and track performance effectively.

adsManagement.title: Ads Management
adsManagement.description: Create, edit and manage Facebook campaigns, ad sets and ads

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Track ad performance with detailed reports and visual charts

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Set up automation rules to optimize ad campaigns

shopManagement.title: Shop Management
shopManagement.description: Manage multiple shops, employees and connected Facebook Pages

register.title: 1. Sign up for an account
steps: Go to homepage and click "Sign up" button
Fill in complete information: Full name, Email, Phone number, Password
Verify email via link sent to your inbox
Log in with newly created account

login.title: 2. Log in
steps: Click "Login" button in the top right corner
Or log in with Facebook without registration
If you forgot password, use "Forgot password" feature

buyPackage.title: 3. Purchase service package
steps: Select number of Pages, Employees, and Shops needed
Wait for admin to approve transaction

dashboard.title: Dashboard - Manage Facebook Pages
dashboard.description: Dashboard is the main page to manage connected Facebook Pages and track their status.

connectPage.title: Connect new Facebook Page
steps: Click "Connect New Page" button (if not reached limit)
Select Page from your Facebook Pages list
Page will appear in list after successful connection

managePages.title: Manage Pages
features: View list: All connected Pages displayed as cards
Filter by status: All, Active, Inactive
Search: Use search bar to find Page by name
View details: Click on Page to see detailed information
Disconnect: Use dropdown menu to disconnect Page

dashboard.note: Note: Number of connectable Pages depends on purchased service package. Check limit in "Service Package" section.

shopManagement.title: Shop Management
shopManagement.description: Shop Management allows you to create and manage multiple shops, each shop can have multiple employees and Facebook Pages.

manageEmployees.title: Manage Employees
steps: Enter employee's email (must be registered in system)

activityHistory.title: Activity History
features: View history of actions in Shop
Filter by date, performer, or action type
Export report if needed

shopManagement.note: Note: Number of Shops and Employees you can create depends on service package. Each Shop can connect multiple Facebook Pages.

adsManagement.title: Ads Management
adsManagement.description: Ads Management is where you create, edit and manage all your Facebook ad campaigns.

structure.title: Ad Structure
items: Campaign: Highest level, contains multiple Ad Sets
Ad Set: Contains multiple Ads, defines audience and budget
Ad: Lowest level, contains creative (images, videos, text)

createCampaign.title: Create new Campaign
steps: Select ad account from dropdown (if multiple accounts)
- Select format: Single Image, Video, Carousel, etc.

manageAds.title: Manage Ads
features: View list: Switch between tabs Campaigns, Ad Sets, Ads
Edit: Click on item to edit
Turn On/Off: Use toggle to turn on/off Campaign, Ad Set, or Ad
Delete: Select item and click Delete button (with confirmation)
Archive: Archive to hide from main list
Sync: Click Sync button to sync data from Facebook

searchFilter.title: Search and Filter
features: Use search bar to find by name
Filter by status: Active, Paused, Archived
Filter by creation date or last modified date

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Analytics provides detailed reports on ad performance with multiple metrics and breakdown options.

viewReports.title: View Reports
steps: - Campaign Name, Ad Set Name, Ad Name
- Page Name, Date, Age Range, etc.

exportReports.title: Export Reports
features: Export data to Excel/CSV file
Save favorite report configurations
Schedule automatic report sending

automation.title: Ads Automation
automation.description: Automation Rules allow you to set up automatic rules to optimize ad campaigns based on performance.

createRule.title: Create Automation Rule
steps: Set name and description for rule

manageRules.title: Manage Rules
features: View list of all rules
Turn rules on/off
Edit or delete rules
View rule execution history

automation.note: Note: Automation rules will run according to set schedule. Ensure ad account is connected and has access permissions.

servicePackage.title: Service Package & Payment
servicePackage.description: The system provides service packages with different limits for Pages, Employees, and Shops.

packageTypes.title: Package Types
items: Chatbot: Basic package with limits on Pages, Employees, Shops
Chatbot AI: Advanced package with more features and higher limits

buyPackage.title: Purchase Service Package
steps: Wait for admin to approve transaction

viewCurrentPackage.title: View Current Package
features: View information on package in use
Check limit and current usage
View expiration date
Upgrade package if needed

adAccount.title: Manage Ad Account
adAccount.description: Connect and manage Facebook ad accounts to use in the system.

connect.title: Connect Ad Account
steps: Go to "Connect Ad Account" from menu
Log in to Facebook and grant access

manage.title: Manage Account
features: View list: All connected accounts
Disconnect: Remove account from system
Sync: Sync data from Facebook
Select default account: Choose account to use when creating ads

adAccount.note: Note: Ensure your Facebook account has permission to manage ad account. After disconnecting, all related data will be deleted.

profile.title: Profile & Settings
profile.description: Manage your personal information and account settings.

changePassword.title: Change Password
steps: Go to "Change password" section in Profile

otherSettings.title: Other Settings
features: Language (Vietnamese / English)
Email notifications
Two-factor authentication (coming soon)

footer.needHelp: Need more help? Contact us via email or hotline.
